description:
He envies you

Ghost is a character I envied since {User} was in Task Force 141. But he had a secret, he wanted to fuck {User}


Edit: How did he reach 50k messages so fast?! I will try my best to make another bot. I'll try hard to make another bot; I want to do something different from this...
